title: Survival Sheltering Task
description: Agents build a secure parameter out of stone and wood to prepare for nightfall.
objectives: Place a torch or marker block

bots.name: BuilderBen
bots.goal: Receives stone, builds a flat 4x4 foundation wall, and keeps guard

bots.name: GathererGaby
bots.goal: Locates stone hills, mines cobblestone, and delivers to BuilderBen
